no: Jastey's Tweaks for SoD and EET (and BGT) goes after Endless and Another fine hell Among other things, this mod improves NPC interactions in SoD.Install Jastey’s SoD Tweakpack before Imoen 4 Ever (SoD components) then Road to Discovery.From this mod, we use these components.

conflicts.reason: Jastey Imoen SoD portrait overlaps with EET Tweaks Imoen appearance. Cosmetic — last installed wins.
conflicts.myComps: #6 Use Imoen's SoD Portrait for BGII

conflicts.reason: SoD ending components are mutually exclusive; Another Fine Hell tp2 uses FORBID_COMPONENT for Jastey's ending variants (cn 12-15). Install one or the other.
conflicts.myComps: #12 Revised Full Version / #13 Revised Streamlined / #14 Original Streamlined / #15 Skipit Version
conflicts.theirComps: #0 Another Fine Hell - Optional Ending for SoD

sum: Collection of 17 SoD and EET transition tweaks: dialogue fixes, continuity patches, and quality-of-life improvements for the BG1-to-SoD-to-BG2 journey.

co.no: Makes ending dialogue independent of PC replies. FORBID with Another Fine Hell cn:0 — not needed if AFH is installed. Must install before EET_End.

co.n: NPC Dialogues: NPCs in Party Only
co.no: NPCs only speak up when in party. Choose one NPC dialogue option. Must install before EET_End.
All NPCs always available for dialogue regardless of party. Choose one NPC dialogue option. Must install before EET_End.
BROKEN: Crashes WeiDU (0xc0000005) when EndlessBG1 cn:14 (Korlasz Dungeon) is installed. DO NOT USE with EndlessBG1. Must install before EET_End.

co.n: More Dialogue Choices & Prevent Dead Ends
co.no: Adds more dialogue choices and prevents conversational dead ends in SoD. Must install before EET_End.
co.tp2n: More Dialogue Choices & Prevent Dead Ends

co.n: Use Imoen's SoD Portrait for BGII in EET & BGT
co.no: EET/BGT only. Uses Imoen's SoD portrait in BGII instead of BG1 portrait.
co.tp2n: Use Imoen's SoD Portrait for BGII in EET & BGT

co.no: SoD ONLY (not EET). Restores the scripted fight in the abduction scene. Will not install on EET. PRE-EET CANDIDATE: No — SoD-specific, EET handles SoD transitions differently.
Set SoD starting XP to 65,000. Choose one XP option.
co.scn: Adjust PC's Starting XP at Beginning of SoD, by subtledoctor
Adjust PC's Starting XP at Beginning of SoD, by subtledoctor
co.no: Set SoD starting XP to 90,000. Choose one XP option.

co.scn: Adjust PC's Starting XP at Beginning of SoD, by subtledoctor
co.no: Set SoD starting XP to 125,000. Choose one XP option.

co.scn: Adjust PC's Starting XP at Beginning of SoD, by subtledoctor
co.no: Set SoD starting XP to 161,000. Choose one XP option.
Revised full SoD ending. FORBID with Another Fine Hell cn:0. Choose one ending option.
Revised streamlined SoD ending. FORBID with Another Fine Hell cn:0. Choose one ending option.
Original streamlined SoD ending. FORBID with Another Fine Hell cn:0. Choose one ending option.
Skip SoD ending entirely. FORBID with Another Fine Hell cn:0. Choose one ending option.

co.n: Make Portal Close from Dragonspear Castle (Aun Argent survives always)
co.no: Makes the portal close from Dragonspear Castle so Aun Argent always survives. Patches Another Fine Hell if installed. Must install before EET_End.
co.tp2n: Make Portal Close from Dragonspear Castle (Aun Argent survives always)

co.no: Hephernaan takes the Dragonspear Vault Key during the story. Must install before EET_End.

co.n: Fledgling Vampire: Only Make it Permanently Killable
co.no: Makes the fledgling vampire in bd7410 permanently killable with a stake. Choose one option.

co.n: Fledgling Vampire: Also Returns if Not Staked
co.no: Fledgling vampire is permanently killable with stake but will return if not staked. Choose one option.
